title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails) to general availability with reported strong performance benchmarks. Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, then will require usage credits.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's general availability release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, the latter being Mythos 5 with guardrails, alongside reported benchmark results. The pricing detail matters for anyone planning usage: Fable 5 is included at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it shifts to requiring usage credits. The key takeaways are the two-model split (a base model and a guardrailed variant) and the limited free-access window before credit-based billing begins.
